Portfolio About Me

About Me

My name is Olena

I'm a motivated and detail-oriented aspiring front-end / full-stack developer seeking an internship or entry-level position to gain hands-on experience in real-world development environments.

Front-End & Web Development
  • Responsive and adaptive web layouts
  • CSS Flexbox, CSS Grid
  • CSS methodologies (BEM, Atomic Design principles)
  • Basic JavaScript for interactivity
  • SVG and web graphics
  • Multi-page websites and CMS integration principles
  • Website performance basics and W3C validation practices
  • Accessibility fundamentals (a11y)
Web, Programming, Tools & Technologies
  • HTML, CSS, JavaScript (practical foundation)
  • C/C++, Python, Java (basics)
  • Git & GitHub (version control, basic workflows)
  • Figma, Zeplin (design mockups)
  • Vite (basic workflow automation)
  • Command line basics
  • SQL (fundamentals)
Soft Skills
  • Consistent and motivated learner
  • Attention to detail
  • Clear communication
  • Discipline and responsibility
  • Ability to work both independently and in a team
Languages
  • Ukrainian, Russian — native
  • English — fluent
  • Portuguese — B1 (independent user)

Education

My Study Courses

Education

  • Professional Course - Técnico/a de Informática – Sistemas (February 2025 - April 2026)

    Course provider - Centro de Formação e Reabilitação Profissional de Alcoitão, Portugal
    Course qualiifcation description: Install, configure, and maintain computer tools, equipment, and systems supported on different platforms and operating systems, manage and administer databases, and develop software, ensuring optimal performance and compliance with occupational health and safety and environmental protection standards.

  • Front-End Web Developer (December 2025 - March 2026)

    Course provider - Udemy™ Online Courses - by Ivan Petrychenko
    Front-End Development (User Side):
    HTML5: Semantic markup, forms, and structuring documents. CSS3: Layouts (Flexbox, Grid), responsiveness (media queries), and styling. JavaScript: DOM manipulation, handling clicks, validation, and interactivity.
    Fundamental Tools & Skills:
    Version Control: Git and GitHub for managing codebase changes. Command Line: Basic terminal commands for navigating and managing files.

Education

  • Front-End Web Developer (May - October 2025)

    Course provider - W3Cx

  • CS50's Introduction to Databases with SQL (March - April 2025)

    Course provider - HarvardX • CS50 SQL

  • Introduction to Computer Science and Programming Using Python (February - March 2025)

    Course provider - MITx • 6.00.1x

  • CS50's Introduction to Programming with Python (January - February 2025)

    Course provider - HarvardX • CS50P

  • CS50's Introduction to Computer Science (September - December 2024)

    Course provider - HarvardX • CS50x

Skills

What I use in my work

HTML5

It provides the structural framework for your website or application, and with HTML5 I can build a more SEO-friendly structure for your product.

CSS3

Is the styling language that allows me to build modern, responsive, and visually appealing interfaces for your website or application.

JavaScript

Is the programming language that brings interactivity to websites and applications. With it, I can build sliders, modals, tooltips, tabs, work with server data, and much more.

jQuery

jQuery is a JavaScript library that simplifies DOM manipulation and speeds up development. Although modern projects often rely on vanilla JavaScript, I am experienced in working with jQuery when needed.

React

Is a JavaScript library for building modern web applications. It enables the creation of highly interactive user interfaces tailored to specific business goals.

Node.js

Is a JavaScript runtime used to build the backend of web applications, handling server-side logic and data processing behind the scenes.

MongoDB

Is a NoSQL database designed for storing and managing application data efficiently.
